docket_entries.description: REPLY IN SUPPORT OF PETITION PURSUANT TO GVT CODE SECTION 946.6 FOR RELIEF FROM LATE FILING OF GVT ENTITY CLAIMS FILED BY PETITIONER REYES, GLORIA
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-26-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. PETITIONER GLORIA REYES' PETITION PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 946.6 FOR RELIEF FROM LATE FILING OF GOVERNMENT ENTITY CLAIMS IS GRANTED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
